name: python3-brlapi
title: python3-brlapi
summary: Braille display access via BRLTTY - Python3 bindings
description:
Braille display access via BRLTTY - Python3 bindings
BRLTTY is a daemon which provides access to the console (text mode)
for a blind person using a braille display.  It drives the braille
display and provides complete screen review functionality.
.
BrlAPI is a library which gives an application access to a braille display and
lets it write braille.
.
This package provides Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-brlapi because Braille display access via BRLTTY - Python3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-brlapi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-brlapi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-brlapi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
